# claudeplatform_federation_issuer (Resource)

A Workload Identity Federation issuer (fdis_...): registers an OIDC identity provider with the organization. Requires an org:admin OAuth token. Destroy archives the issuer; archiving fails while a live federation rule references it. Note: an OAuth caller cannot update an issuer that backs a rule scoped to anything other than workspace:developer/workspace:inference — keep bootstrap (org:admin) rules on a dedicated, Console-managed issuer.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `issuer_url` (String) The OIDC issuer URL, compared byte-for-byte against the JWT iss claim. Must be https on port 443 when Anthropic dials it (discovery mode without discovery_base).
- `name` (String) Name, lowercase alphanumeric plus hyphens, unique per organization.

### Optional

- `ca_cert_pem` (String) PEM CA certificate for issuers serving TLS from a private CA (discovery/explicit_url modes).
- `jwks` (Block, Optional) How Anthropic obtains the issuer's signing keys. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--jwks))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--jwks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `jwks`

Required:

- `type` (String) discovery | explicit_url | inline.

Optional:

- `discovery_base` (String) discovery mode only: base URL for /.well-known/openid-configuration when it differs from issuer_url.
- `keys_json` (String) inline mode: JSON array of JWK objects (the "keys" array of a JWKS document). No automatic key refresh in inline mode — key rotation requires updating this attribute.
- `url` (String) explicit_url mode: the JWKS endpoint URL.
